briefs.title: BC Parks camping fees rise and non-residents now pay a surcharge starting Jan 30
briefs.summary: BC Parks updated its recreation fee rules: general camping fees increased (up to $51/night), and visitors from outside BC must now pay an extra $5–$30 surcharge on top of regular fees.
briefs.action_required: Update your pricing or staff briefings if your business books or resells BC Parks reservations for customers.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation changes take effect

briefs.industries: Hotel & Accommodation, Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources
